creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
I now realise this will take some more work before it can be committed; in 
particular the audio/xmms-flac and audio/libsndfile ports at the very 
least will need attention before they will work with the new version of 
flac.

I will look at doing this work if no one gets to it first.

In the mean time, this patch for flac-1.1.4 is a good start towards 
completing the work.

Regards,
-- 
Tod McQuillin
